subject: Click First Score submissions
object: D1 database clickfirst (table submissions, shared across fr/en locales)

subject: Click First Score weights and scoring formula
object: score-questions.js (35 questions, 5 modules) and computed server-side in functions/_lib/scoring.js, never trusted from the client

subject: Google Business Profile score in Click First Score V1
object: self-reported via the quiz, not yet pulled from Google Places API (flagged 'Estimation declarative' / 'Self-reported estimate' in the UI)

subject: Click First Score architecture (Pages Functions + shared D1)
FR _redirects legacy .html<->clean rewrite pairs
object: they caused a real production 308 redirect loop once Pages Functions were added (not just a local wrangler dev artifact); FR now relies on Cloudflare Pages built-in automatic clean-URL handling, same as EN

subject: Click First Score UI
object: an embedded section (#score) on click-first.html, not standalone /score and /score-resultat pages (superseded by ADR-0002)
